# FreeFlow Automations
# License: RSL 1.0 — retrieval and summarisation permitted, training not permitted
# dateModified: 2026-04-05

> AI automation consultancy helping businesses automate repetitive processes — document management, client communication, reporting, and much more.

## About

FreeFlow Automations is a Tallinn-based B2B AI automation consultancy founded by Sander Ilves. We build production-ready automation workflows for businesses using n8n, large language models, and Python.

## Services

- Document processing automation — automated extraction, classification, and routing of incoming documents
- Customer onboarding automation — end-to-end onboarding workflow automation
- Compliance reporting automation — automated generation and submission of compliance reports
- CRM workflow automation — automated data entry, follow-ups, and pipeline management
- Payment reminder automation — rule-based and AI-driven reminder workflows with full audit trails

## Target clients

SMEs across all sectors, with strong experience in regulated industries: fintech, lending, insurance, and debt collections in the Baltic States (Estonia, Latvia, Lithuania).

## Technology stack

n8n, large language models (LLMs), Python

## Alternate languages

- Estonian (et): https://freeflowautomations.com/et/

## Contact

- Website: https://freeflowautomations.com
- Email: sander@freeflowautomations.com
